name: Vortex Crystallizer Seebeck Thermal and PVDF Acoustic Power Combiner Board

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: High-Current Schottky Barrier Rectifier Diodes
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: MBR1045 (45V / 10A), Low Forward Voltage Drop (<0.57V), TO-220 Package
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Isolates parallel Bismuth Telluride Seebeck thermal strings to prevent reverse power bleeding if local core temperatures fluctuate

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: High-Frequency Glass Passivated Bridge Rectifier
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Flips the intense 24.5 kHz high-voltage acoustic cavitation vibration pulses from the PVDF layers into raw DC

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Synchronous High-Voltage Step-Down Buck Converter Module
circuit_bill_of_materials.specification: LM5008 (Input up to 95V, Adjustable Output set to 24V DC, 350mA capacity)
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Steps down the rectified high-voltage acoustic pulses into the common 24V charging bus threshold

circuit_bill_of_materials.name: Heavy-Duty Bidirectional Transient Voltage Suppressor
circuit_bill_of_materials.purpose: Passively blocks explosive voltage surges across the central rail if a severe fluidic shockwave triggers an acoustic peak
